# isReadyForMoreMediaData

**Instance Property**

Indicates the readiness of the processor to accept more sample buffers.

## Declaration

```swift
var isReadyForMoreMediaData: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

An [doc://com.apple.mediaextension/documentation/MediaExtension/MERAWProcessor] operates asynchronously and often has a fixed capacity for buffers in flight in the processor. This property allows the processor to signal to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/VideoToolbox] that its internal buffers are full and cannot accept more samples. The processor must use [doc://com.apple.mediaextension/documentation/MediaExtension/MERAWProcessorReadyForMoreMediaDataDidChangeNotification] to notify Video Toolbox when this property changes.

## Inspecting a RAW processor

- **metalDeviceRegistryID**: Requests the processor use the provided Metal device for processing.
- **outputColorAttachments**: Returns the color-related Core Video image buffer keys and values that become attachments to the output pixel buffers.
- **processingParameters**: Provides a list of processing parameters that can be changed by the client of Video Toolbox session to influence processing behavior.
